## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Okta and GrowthX to discuss progress on AI-powered account research and outreach initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Okta is building an AI-powered engine for account research and outreach, currently using Clay for data enrichment and Gemini for AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing more advanced AI workflows that could significantly enhance Okta's capabilities, but integration is limited by data privacy concerns](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Next steps include GrowthX demoing their agentic researcher, Okta providing sample contact data, and exploring how to present the project to leadership](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

## Topics

### Current Account Research Process

  - [Rachael using personal Clay account for data enrichment on 44 retail accounts](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Focus on accounts with loyalty programs as key characteristic](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Data uploaded to Notebook LM and Gemini for SDR use](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Limited by Gemini's 10-document upload limit](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)

### GrowthX's AI Capabilities

  - [More advanced than current Okta setup, using agentic researchers that loop and reason](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Can potentially automate lead qualification and personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Integration limited by Okta's data privacy concerns](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Data Privacy and Tool Constraints

  - [Okta not pulling contacts from Clay due to privacy concerns](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Gemini is only approved AI tool, but has limitations](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Exploring workarounds like manually compiling SDR-selected contacts](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)

### Vision for Future State

  - [Automated lead qualification and personalized outreach without SDR involvement](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Command center interface for prioritizing accounts and generating outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Potentially building in-house solution instead of using third-party tools like Common Room](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)

### Okta Artifact Development

  - [GrowthX to create initial Okta-specific artifacts for review](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2779.0)
  - [Rachael to provide access to Okta subject matter experts for refining artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to demo GrowthX's agentic researcher at next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
  - [Rachael to provide sample contact data for one account by next Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2605.0)
  - [SDRs to compile top 5 leads per account with LinkedIn URLs by end of Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)
  - [George to send updated versions of Auth0 artifacts for final review](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2812.0)
  - [Rachael to arrange access to Okta experts for developing Okta-specific artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)
  - [Explore how to present current progress and future vision to Okta leadership](https://fathom.video/share/Ze2djgsreUn6cGqPiGyhx8RW3JaD7NHx?tab=summary&timestamp=2622.0)
